Brief Description: Circomscribe is a tool showing what lines of a given Circom file produce what constraints (if any).\footnote{You like Circom but you find it confusing? Introducing Circomscribe - ZK/SEC Quarterly (\url{https://blog.zksecurity.xyz/posts/circomscribe/})} Circomscribe shows only the first output of the Circom compiler, but not what the actual compiled circuit looks like. Essentially, Circomscribe is a modified version of the Circom compiler running in WebAssembly (Wasm) and reporting information in a JSON format. Albeit interesting, Circomscribe is not actually a security analysis tool, but rather a simple code inspector.
